How Urban Farms Rebuilt Community

Vacant lots transformed into productive gardens in less than two years.

Background

Local residents partnered with civic organizations for micro-grants.

Turning Point

A heat wave made food deserts visible and accelerated participation.

A B2B SaaS company redesigned first-run tasks and support messaging.

Outcome

  • Activation improved from 48% to 67%
  • Support tickets decreased by 22%

Meet Nimbus: Your Team's Second Brain

Nimbus unifies docs, meetings, and workflows into a shared memory layer.

Problem

Knowledge is fragmented across tools, leading to repeated work.

Solution

Context-aware retrieval and action suggestions keep teams aligned.

Proof

Pilot customers reduced time-to-answer by 41 percent.
